title: metastelma arizonicum subsp. chiapense
intro: Metastelma arizonicum subsp. chiapense, also known as Chiapas Metastelma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Metastelma arizonicum subsp. chiapense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and infections. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbal preparations also using the leaves and stems in a topical application to treat skin ailments and promote wound healing.
